description: Replace reqwest with ureq + release profile (strip, lto, opt-z, codegen-units 1, panic abort)

asi.hypothesis: reqwest pulls tokio async runtime + TLS stack; ureq is sync-only with native TLS; release profile strips debug info and enables LTO
asi.next_action_hint: try disabling default features on ratatui and crossterm

asi.rollback_reason: No size change - crossterm is pulled in anyway via ratatui dep
asi.next_action_hint: try replacing ureq with minreq for even smaller HTTP

description: Replace ureq with minreq (even smaller HTTP client)

asi.hypothesis: minreq has fewer deps than ureq, especially around TLS stack
asi.next_action_hint: try using minreq https-rustls instead of https-native, or try minreq without TLS + custom rustls

description: Switch minreq from https-native to https-rustls

asi.rollback_reason: rustls embeds crypto + root certs in binary (+484 KB vs native-tls which dynamically links system TLS)
asi.next_action_hint: try opt-level s instead of z, or try removing anyhow

description: Switch opt-level from z to s

asi.rollback_reason: opt-level z produces 175 KB smaller binary than s for this codebase
asi.next_action_hint: try removing anyhow (use Box<dyn Error> instead) or try home crate instead of dirs

description: Replace dirs with home crate (-3 deps, same size)

asi.hypothesis: home is simpler than dirs - only finds home dir, no XDG/app dirs
asi.next_action_hint: profile which sections of the binary are biggest - try cargo-bloat or just look at dep sizes

asi.rollback_reason: ratatui controls crossterm features internally, our crossterm dep features dont matter
asi.next_action_hint: try replacing clap derive with manual arg parsing to remove syn + clap_derive

asi.hypothesis: removing clap color/suggestions removes ansi_term and strsim deps
asi.next_action_hint: at 919 KB we are near the floor for this dep set. remaining size is ratatui+crossterm+serde+clap core. could try removing serde derive for manual impls but code churn is huge

asi.hypothesis: removing anyhow causes type conflicts - Result alias clashes with parse_key_val, crossterm needs Send+Sync errors
asi.next_action_hint: anyhow is tiny after LTO - not worth the code churn. we are at the floor at 919 KB
